productDisplayName: Lino Perros Men Light Brown Suspenders
description: Stylish suspenders from Linos Perros made of fine elastic with clip-on steel fasteners for a secure Fit. men can wear this in place of a belt to perfectly capture a formal vintage style. women can wear this with a short skirt, tights and a formal shirt for a classy borrowed-from-the-boys look. Contrasting braid.Width: 1.5"CareHand wash using a mild detergent
